Russian
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Russian lesbian, gay, and AIDS-related publications and ephemera
Lamb, Kevin
7694
1 cubic feet.
1 mapcase folders.
1992-1997. Printed materials. Material collected in Moscow and St. Petersburg, Russia, during the 1996-97 academic year, while Lamb worked for Aesop, a Moscow AIDS prevention organiation, running their gay and bisexual men's outreach program. Some material was purchased at bookstores and erotic boutiques, and some was picked up in bars and clubs. Collection material in Russian, and English 4796809
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Andrea Hektor
Date completed:
August 2003
EAD encoding:
Andrea Hektor, August 2003
Date modified:
Jude Corina, June 2017
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Material collected in Moscow and St. Petersburg, Russia, during the 1996-97 academic year, while Lamb worked for Aesop, a Moscow AIDS prevention organiation, running their gay and bisexual men's outreach program. Some material was purchased at bookstores and erotic boutiques, and some was picked up in bars and clubs.
Included are 14 books of poetry and fiction with gay themes either written in or translated into Russian, including the first Russian translation of James Baldwin's Giovanni's Room. These are cataloged separately.
RELATED MATERIALS
Collecting Program: Human Sexuality Collection.
Cite As:
Russian lesbian, gay, and AIDS-related publications and ephemera, #7694. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Processing Information
Approximate English translations of Russian titles have been provided.
AIDS (Disease) -- Russia. Gays -- Russia. Lesbians -- Russia. Gay liberation movement
